title: Vijay Addresses Massive Rally in Salem West Demanding Powerloom Reforms
summary: TVK chief Vijay addresses a massive rally in Salem West demanding powerloom sector reforms today. Thousands of textile workers gathered to hear his promises on industry revival.

title: DMK Candidate Promises Industrial Growth in Salem North
summary: DMK candidate in Salem North kicks off door-to-door campaign promising industrial growth and new job creation in the steel city.

title: AIADMK Distributes Voter Awareness Pamphlets in Omalur
summary: AIADMK workers in Omalur distribute voter awareness pamphlets under the SVEEP initiative urging 100% turnout.

title: BJP Rally in Edappadi Seeks Textile Industry Revival
summary: BJP candidate in Edappadi holds a rally seeking textile industry revival for powerloom workers, promising central scheme support.

title: TVK Cadre Distributes Booth Slips Across 50 Booths
summary: TVK cadre in Salem South conducts booth slip distribution drive across 50 booths as part of voter outreach.

title: Flying Squads Seize Unaccounted Cash in Mettur
summary: Flying squads seize unaccounted cash in Mettur constituency under model code violation today.

title: Salem Collector Reviews Election Preparedness
summary: Salem district collector reviews election preparedness in the control room with senior officials and observers.

title: Paramilitary CRPF Deployed in Sensitive Salem North
summary: Paramilitary CRPF forces have been deployed in sensitive areas of Salem North for safe and fair polling on April 23.

title: DMK Pledges Free Power for Powerloom Units
summary: DMK candidate in Salem South pledges free power for powerloom units if the party returns to power.

title: Kamal Haasan Campaigns in Salem North
summary: Kamal Haasan campaigns for MNM in Salem North urging youth to participate actively in the polling process.

title: Cash-Laden Vehicle Seized in Veerapandi
summary: Flying squads nab a cash-laden vehicle in Veerapandi constituency in a major model code enforcement action.

title: Observer Verifies EVMs in Omalur Strong Room
summary: Election observer verifies EVM machines in Omalur strong room ahead of polling day to ensure full transparency.

title: BJP Promises Skill Training in Gangavalli (SC)
summary: BJP candidate in Gangavalli (SC) promises skill training programmes for textile workers and rural youth.

title: Liquor Bottles Seized in Mettur MCC Check
summary: Flying squads seize illegal liquor bottles in Mettur during a routine model code violation check.

title: DMK Star Campaigner Visits Veerapandi
summary: A DMK star campaigner visits Veerapandi promising exporter-friendly policies and industrial incentives.

title: AIADMK's Sankari Candidate Launches Home Voting Awareness
summary: AIADMK candidate in Sankari launches home voting awareness drive for senior citizens.

title: Observer Inspects EVM Randomization in Gangavalli (SC)
summary: An observer inspects the EVM randomization process in Gangavalli (SC) constituency.

title: NTK Workers Highlight Local Issues in Omalur
summary: NTK workers in Omalur highlight local agriculture issues during a street campaign.

title: Congress Files MCC Violation Complaint in Attur (SC)
summary: Congress candidate in Attur (SC) files a complaint over a model code violation by a rival.

title: SVEEP Awareness Rally in Yercaud (ST)
summary: SVEEP team organises a voter awareness rally in the tribal-reserved Yercaud (ST) constituency.

title: TVK Meets Exporters in Veerapandi
summary: TVK candidate in Veerapandi meets exporters promising export incentives and policy support.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Salem Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Salem have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Salem
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Salem, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Salem
summary: SVEEP teams in Salem performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Salem
summary: Flying squads in Salem have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Salem Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Salem is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Salem
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Salem to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Salem Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Salem hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Salem Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Salem are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Salem After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Salem have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Salem Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Salem highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Salem
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Salem has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Salem Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Salem constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Salem Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Salem to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

title: TVK Cadre Steps Up Door-to-Door Drive in Salem
summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Salem, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

title: Salem Administration Installs Awareness Hoardings
summary: The Salem district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

title: Salem Police Beef Up Security at Sensitive Booths
summary: Salem district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Salem
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Salem as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

title: Congress Workers Hold Street-Corner Meetings in Salem
summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Salem to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

title: Voter Helpline Sees Spike in Calls from Salem
summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Salem, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

title: Liquor Seizure Reported During Salem Checks
summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Salem, and the contraband has been impounded.

title: Salem Voter List Final Verification Concluded
summary: Booth-level officers in Salem have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

title: NTK Organises Cycle Rally Across Salem Towns
summary: Naam Tamilar Katchi organised a cycle rally across Salem towns to highlight environmental and identity-based issues ahead of polling.

title: Salem Differently-Abled Voters Get Dedicated Assistance
summary: Differently-abled voters in Salem are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

title: Income Tax Teams Conduct Discreet Surveys in Salem
summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Salem to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.

title: Sector Officers Deployed Across Salem Polling Zones
summary: Sector officers have been deployed across Salem polling zones to monitor turnout, address grievances, and report issues in real time.

title: Star Campaigners Schedule Final Rallies in Salem
summary: Major political parties have scheduled final-phase rallies of star campaigners in Salem as the silent period nears.

title: Social Media Influencers Promote Turnout in Salem
summary: Local social media influencers in Salem are running short-form video campaigns urging youth to vote on April 23.

title: Salem Cybercrime Cell Monitors Election Misinformation
summary: The Salem cybercrime cell is actively monitoring social media platforms for election-related misinformation and hate speech.

title: Salem Election Control Room Operates Round the Clock
summary: The election control room in Salem is functioning round the clock to handle voter complaints, MCC violations, and logistical queries.

title: Women Self-Help Groups Address Salem Candidates
summary: Women self-help group federations in Salem addressed candidates seeking concrete commitments on livelihood and credit access.

title: Salem Senior Citizens Avail Home Voting Facility
summary: Senior citizens above 85 in Salem are availing the home voting facility, with polling teams visiting registered residences.

title: Bank Cash Movement Tracked in Salem
summary: Bank cash movement above the threshold in Salem is being tracked and verified by election expenditure observers.

summary: Election officials in Salem have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.
